entities.name: relationshipDepth
entities.context: Derived metric measuring relationship closeness, calculated from warmth and familiarity scores on 0-10 scale

entities.name: warmthScore
entities.context: Component metric contributing to relationshipDepth calculation

entities.name: familiarityScore
entities.context: Component metric contributing to relationshipDepth calculation

entities.name: formality
entities.context: Communication style parameter with levels: formal, balanced, casual

entities.name: ctaRigour
entities.context: Call-to-action directness parameter with levels: direct, balanced, soft

entities.name: voice.md
entities.context: Configuration file at N5/prefs/communication/voice.md defining voice parameters and context overrides

entities.name: dialInferenceReport
entities.context: Output artifact for derived communication parameters

relationships.context: warmthScore is a component in the relationshipDepth formula
familiarityScore is a component in the relationshipDepth formula
formality defaults are determined by relationshipDepth level
voice.md provides context overrides for formality settings
relationshipDepth is one factor in determining ctaRigour
